codeReview.summary: The integration tests comprehensively cover all expected cross-area flows as specified in the feature requirements. The implementation adds 980 lines of well-structured integration tests covering 13 test functions with 50+ sub-test scenarios. All tests pass and the worker followed the TDD procedure correctly.

summary: PASS: The integration tests implementation fully covers all required cross-area flows (VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-007) plus VAL-STORAGE-015. The tests are comprehensive, well-organized, and all 13 integration test functions pass. The worker followed the skill procedure correctly, used proper test helpers, and included additional valuable tests for default values, boolean variations, multiple parameter usage, and empty string handling. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
